dispatches.task: Implement graceful shutdown mechanism with signal handling and connection draining for Server struct
Add HEAD and OPTIONS method support to handle_connection function in server.rs
Expand MIME type support in get_content_type function to include WebP, AVIF, WASM, and other modern formats
Implement ServerBuilder pattern for optional configuration (CORS, custom headers, timeouts)
Add optional connection pooling or thread pool for better resource management under load
Add integration tests for new HTTP methods and graceful shutdown scenarios
dispatches.verify_cmd: find tests -name '*.rs' | xargs grep -l 'shutdown\|HEAD\|OPTIONS' && cargo test

dispatches.task: Review all changes for backward compatibility, performance impact, and API design consistency before release
dispatches.verify_cmd: cargo test && cargo doc --no-deps && cargo bench
